title: Dependency on sequences is not updated for `ALTER TABLE t ALTER COLUMN c DROP DEFAULT`
description:
### What happens?

```sql
$ duckdb-nightly
v1.1.4-dev2853 2d123094bb
Enter ".help" for usage hints.
Connected to a transient in-memory database.
Use ".open FILENAME" to reopen on a persistent database.
D create sequence s1;
D create table t (id bigint default nextval('s1'), v text);
D alter table t alter column id drop default;
D drop sequence s1;
Dependency Error:
Cannot drop entry "s1" because there are entries that depend on it.
table "t" depends on index "s1".
Use DROP...CASCADE to drop all dependents.
```

### To Reproduce

```sql
create sequence s1;
create table t (id bigint default nextval('s1'), v text);
alter table t alter column id drop default;
drop sequence s1;
```

### OS:

macOS aarch64

### DuckDB Version:

v1.1.3,v1.1.4-dev2853

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Fan Yang

### Affiliation:

ApeCloud

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have tested with a nightly build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

- [X] Yes, I have

- [X] Yes, I have
poc: create table t (id bigint default nextval('s1'), v text);
alter table t alter column id drop default;
key_bug_features: Dropping default value without updating dependencies
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id integer DEFAULT nextval('s2'), name varchar(255) NOT NULL, created_at timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE t2 ALTER COLUMN id DROP DEFAULT;
